mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_totp (user_id, secret_enc, enabled, confirmed_at, last_step, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{secretEnc}, #{enabled}, #{confirmedAt}, #{lastStep}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_totp SET enabled = 1, confirmed_at = #{at} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_totp SET last_step = #{step} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO totp_recovery (id, user_id, salt, code_hash, expires_at, used, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{salt}, #{codeHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{used}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM totp_recovery WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE totp_recovery SET used = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE totp_recovery SET used = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND used = 0
